entities.name: GRASS SILAGE
entities.description: Fermented grass used as a substrate for anaerobic digestion

entities.name: NH4CL
entities.description: A macro-nutrient added to improve digestion and methane yield

entities.name: MICRO-NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential trace elements including Fe, Ni, Co, and Mo added to the digestion process

entities.name: CHEMICAL OXYGEN DEMAND SOLUBILISATION
entities.description: The process of converting organic matter into soluble forms, measured as COD

entities.name: ANAEROBIC MONO-DIGESTION
entities.description: The biological process of breaking down a single organic substrate in the absence of oxygen

entities.name: LEACH BED REACTOR
entities.description: A type of reactor used for the anaerobic digestion of solid substrates

entities.name: 35°C
entities.description: The temperature at which the leach bed reactor experiments were conducted

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL METHANE POTENTIAL ASSAYS
entities.description: Tests used to determine the maximum amount of methane that can be produced from a substrate

entities.name: METHANE YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of methane produced per unit of volatile solids added
